narrative:
Chagrin Falls Twp-00-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 111 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.1 percentage points.
